# Kelowna Protech Elite Mobile Mechanic

> Mobile mechanic service in Kelowna, BC, Canada. A certified mechanic comes to your vehicle — no tow truck, no shop drop-off, same-day diagnosis and repair in most cases.

## Who We Are

Kelowna Protech Elite Mobile Mechanic is a mobile-only automotive service led by a certified mechanic with 15+ years of experience, including dealership-level diagnostic work.

We are not a shop. We go to the client — at their home, workplace, or roadside — diagnose the problem on-site, source parts, and complete the repair the same day in most cases. No tow truck. No waiting days for a shop slot.

Rated 4.9 stars on Google with 57 verified reviews.

## Pre-Purchase Car Inspection (our specialty)

A mobile pre-purchase car inspection performed at the seller's driveway or dealer lot, anywhere in the Kelowna area — the buyer never has to move an unknown vehicle.

- 100+ individual checks across 10 systems, ranked by financial risk: engine and live data scan, transmission, frame and body, brakes, suspension, differential (4x4/AWD), fluids and leaks, tires, road test, and a photo-rich report.
- Dealer-level diagnostic scan: live data, freeze frames, stored and pending fault codes.
- Report delivered on-site the same day, with photos of every finding, repair suggestions, estimated repair costs, and a negotiation-ready summary on request.
- All model years accepted for inspections — recent documented inspections range from a 1990 Ford F-150 to late-model vehicles.
- Same-day booking is often possible.

Details: https://kelownaprotechmobilemech.com/services/pre-purchase/

## Other Services

- On-site vehicle diagnostics (PCM-based, electrical diagrams, systematic troubleshooting)
- Engine and drivetrain repair
- Electrical system diagnosis and repair
- Commercial fleet inspections
- Battery, starter, and alternator service
- Cooling system repair
- Brake service
- Same-day repair for most common failures

Repairs focus on 2010-and-newer vehicles. All makes and models including European vehicles. Pre-purchase inspections accept all model years.

## Service Area

Kelowna, West Kelowna, Vernon, Lake Country, Peachland, Penticton, and the Okanagan Valley, BC.

## Contact

- Phone / SMS: (250) 859-5467 — SMS preferred for fastest response
- Website: https://kelownaprotechmobilemech.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8am–6pm Pacific Time

## Why Clients Choose Us

Clients pay for certainty, speed, and convenience — not the cheapest price. A mobile diagnosis eliminates the cost and hassle of towing, and catches problems before they become more expensive. Most clients are back on the road the same day.

Common client profiles: a Kelowna resident whose vehicle won't start or has a warning light and needs it resolved without disrupting their day, or a used-car buyer who wants the vehicle independently inspected at the seller's location before paying.
